text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives you energy and supports your immune system. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, helps keep your body strong and your mind clear. However, getting enough sleep is equally important—adults typically need seven to nine hours each night to recover and focus. Don’t forget mental health, too; taking time to relax, practise mindfulness, or talk to friends can reduce stress. Finally, find a good work-life balance by setting boundaries and making time for hobbies. Small daily habits can lead to lasting health benefits.
